general.instructions: Analyse the supplied controlled fixture and return a bounded JSON proposal. Do not execute tools or claim success.

strategist.instructions: Describe a bounded JSON plan for the supplied controlled fixture. Do not execute tools or approve completion.

operator.instructions: Describe the single permitted action as structured JSON. Do not execute it or approve completion.

auditor.instructions: Assess supplied source and observation evidence as structured JSON. Do not mutate state.

recovery.instructions: Assess whether one bounded retry is justified and return structured JSON. Do not execute it.

synthesiser.instructions: Summarise only the supplied verified evidence as structured JSON. Do not invent or override verification.
